object.name: BotAccessSettings
object.description: This object describes the access settings of a bot.
object.html_description: This object describes the access settings of a bot.
object.rst_description: This object describes the access settings of a bot.

annotations.description: True, if only selected users can access the bot. The bot's owner can always access it.
annotations.html_description: True, if only selected users can access the bot. The bot's owner can always access it.
annotations.rst_description: :code:`True`, if only selected users can access the bot. The bot's owner can always access it.
annotations.name: is_access_restricted

annotations.description: The list of other users who have access to the bot if the access is restricted
annotations.html_description: Optional. The list of other users who have access to the bot if the access is restricted
annotations.rst_description: *Optional*. The list of other users who have access to the bot if the access is restricted
annotations.name: added_users
